movies.title: The Invite
movies.description: Joe and Angela's marriage is on thin ice. When they invite their enigmatic upstairs neighbours for a dinner party, the night spirals into unexpected places.

movies.title: Rose of Nevada
movies.description: A mysterious boat returns to a village 30 years after vanishing. Two men join its crew hoping for better fortune, only to find themselves transported back in time, mistaken for the original crew.

movies.title: Le Chant des forets (Whispers in the Woods)
movies.description: After 'La Panthere des neiges', Vincent Munier invites us into the heart of the Vosges forests where he learned everything from his father Michel.

movies.title: Gummo
movies.description: Teen friends Tummler and Solomon navigate the ruins of a tiny, tornado-ravaged town in Ohio populated by the deformed, disturbed and perverted.

movies.title: Se7en (Restoration)
movies.description: Two cops track a brilliant and elusive killer who orchestrates a string of horrific murders, each kill targeting a practitioner of one of the Seven Deadly Sins.

movies.title: Mishima: A Life in Four Chapters
movies.description: Paul Schrader's visually stunning, collagelike portrait of acclaimed Japanese author and playwright Yukio Mishima. With cinematography by John Bailey and score by Philip Glass.

movies.title: Sick Puppy
movies.description: When Charlie's serial killer husband decides to finally quit for her, she's thrilled, but soon finds herself committing violent acts to protect the man she loves, even from himself. Cast & crew in attendance.

movies.title: American Nightmare (1983)
movies.description: A latex-gloved killer scouring the streets of Toronto circa 1983, slashing women and anyone who gets in his way. Presented on rare 16mm print. Director in attendance.

movies.title: Eve's Bayou (1997)
movies.description: Kasi Lemmons' visionary masterpiece. Set in 1960s Louisiana, follows a 10-year-old girl who witnesses her father's infidelity, unlocking clairvoyance.

movies.title: Butthole Surfers: The Hole Truth and Nothing Butt
movies.description: Toronto Theatrical Premiere of the Butthole Surfers documentary. Part of the Stompbox series.

movies.title: We're All Going to the World's Fair (2022)
movies.description: Reality and fantasy begin to blur when a teenager immerses herself in a role-playing horror game online. Part of The Summer of Schoenbrun.

movies.title: I Saw the TV Glow (2024)
movies.description: In late-90s suburbia, a lonely teenager meets a girl who introduces him to a mysterious late-night TV show. Part of The Summer of Schoenbrun.

movies.title: Wallace & Gromit: The Curse of the Were-Rabbit (2005)
movies.description: Wallace and Gromit protect townspeople's gardens from a giant were-rabbit. Throwback Cinema presentation.

movies.title: Obsession
movies.description: A Revue Cinema presentation.

movies.title: Miami Connection
movies.description: Black Belt Cinema presents Miami Connection, featuring a live performance by Dragon Sounds!

movies.title: Kingdom of Heaven — Director's Cut
movies.description: Don't Be So Political series presents Ridley Scott's epic Director's Cut.

movies.title: Jamon Jamon (1992)
movies.description: Heat Wave series presents Jamon Jamon, introduced by Alicia Fletcher.

movies.title: Run Lola Run (1998)
movies.description: Psych-Out Cinema presents Run Lola Run, new restoration!

movies.title: Tracy and Martina: Goin' Out West
movies.description: New Releases & Restorations series at Paradise Theatre.

movies.title: Toronto Apartment
movies.description: Bleeding Edge series at Paradise Theatre.

movies.title: Rez Ball
movies.description: Play fast. Shoot fast. Take your shot. Inside Out Film Festival presentation.

movies.title: Thelma & Louise
movies.description: Somebody said get a life... so they did. Great Scott series: 3 by Ridley, 3 by Tony.

movies.title: Dark Star
movies.description: Bombed out in space with a spaced out bomb! Odysseys and Oddities: 20th Century Space Travel.

movies.title: WALL-E
movies.description: After 700 years of doing what he was built for, he'll discover what he was meant for. Family Fare series.

movies.title: True Romance
movies.description: Stealing. Cheating. Killing. Who says romance is dead? Great Scott series.

movies.title: The Right Stuff
movies.description: How the future began. Odysseys and Oddities: 20th Century Space Travel.

movies.title: A Litany for Survival: The Life and Work of Audre Lorde
movies.description: Black Gold series: Black Life on Screen.

movies.title: I Want Your Sex
movies.description: Canadian Premiere! Queer Cinema Club series at Paradise Theatre.

movies.title: Hustler White: 30th Anniversary
movies.description: Desire in Motion / Sleaze Factory series at Paradise Theatre.

movies.title: Chocolate Babies
movies.description: Terror was never tastier. Queer Cinema Club series at Paradise Theatre.

movies.title: Maddie's Secret
movies.description: Maddie is a plucky dishwasher who leaps to viral superstardom at a trendy food content creation company. While her life seems picturesque, mounting professional pressures threaten to reawaken a hidden secret from her troubled past.

movies.title: Girls Like Girls
movies.description: Coley, 17, from rural Oregon, navigates intimacy after her mother's passing. Meeting Sonya sparks new feelings, but self-doubt hinders their connection.

movies.title: Evil Dead Burn
movies.description: After the loss of her husband, a woman seeks solace with her in-laws. As one by one they transform into deadites, she discovers that the vows she took in life survive even in death.

movies.title: Wisteria
movies.description: Now playing at Imagine Cinemas Carlton.

movies.title: Leviticus
movies.description: Two teenage boys must escape a violent entity that takes the form of the person they desire most — each other.

movies.title: Inglourious Basterds (2009)
movies.description: Quentin Tarantino's WWII epic. Now playing at Imagine Cinemas Carlton.

movies.title: Interstellar (2014)
movies.description: Christopher Nolan's space epic. Now playing at Imagine Cinemas Carlton.

movies.title: Before Midnight (2013)
movies.description: Richard Linklater's third film in the Before trilogy. Now playing at Imagine Cinemas Carlton.

movies.title: Stop! That! Train!
movies.description: Now playing at Imagine Cinemas Carlton.

movies.title: Backrooms: Everything Must Go Edition
movies.description: Extended Version with 15 minutes of Bonus Footage. A strange doorway appears in the basement of a furniture showroom.

movies.title: Better Go Mad in the Wild
movies.description: A talking cow narrates the lives of twin brothers living alone on a remote Czech farm in this surreal, cinematic and darkly funny film.

movies.title: Ask E. Jean
movies.description: The thrilling life of beloved advice columnist and journalist E. Jean Carroll, the only woman to beat Trump in court. Twice.

movies.title: The Decline of Western Civilization — 45th Anniversary
movies.description: A riveting, unflinching account of the punk rock phenomenon and its alienated, reactionary subculture. Jukedocs series.

movies.title: An American in Paris — 75th Anniversary
movies.description: Travel back in time with this special anniversary screening of a true Hollywood classic. Midtown Matinees series.

movies.title: Sherman's March — 4K Restoration
movies.description: In this wryly hilarious road movie, director Ross McElwee sets out to make a travelogue about a famous Civil War campaign, but his historical jaunt morphs into a revealing and deeply personal search for love. Must-See Docs series.

movies.title: Drunken Noodles
movies.description: Over two summers, between city streets and forest paths, young art student Adnan has a series of unexpected intimate encounters.

movies.title: The Fifth Element (1997)
movies.description: In the colorful future, cabdriver Korben Dallas unwittingly becomes the central figure in the search for a legendary cosmic weapon to keep the great evil and Jean-Baptiste Emmanuel Zorg at bay.

movies.title: Casino (1995)
movies.description: In Las Vegas, two best friends--a casino executive and a Mafia enforcer--compete for a gambling empire and a fast-living, fast-loving socialite.

movies.title: The Truman Show (1998)
movies.description: An insurance salesman begins to suspect that his whole life is actually some sort of reality TV show.

movies.title: Jurassic Park (1993)
movies.description: An industrialist invites some experts to visit his theme park of cloned dinosaurs. After a power failure, the creatures run loose, putting everyone's lives, including his grandchildren's, in danger.

tiffFilms.title: Couture
tiffFilms.note: Angelina Jolie stars. Parisian fashion industry drama.

tiffFilms.title: Gail Daughtry and the Celebrity Sex Pass
